description_long: This is a modern athletic slip-on shoe featuring a dark gray, textured knit upper with a seamless design and no visible laces. The midsole is thick and white with a speckled pattern, providing a visually striking contrast and likely enhanced cushioning. An orange accent wraps around the heel area, adding a pop of color and a sporty touch. The heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing, and the side displays a subtle brand logo. The shoe's overall silhouette is streamlined and ergonomic, designed for comfort and casual urban wear. The outsole appears to be made of durable rubber, suitable for walking on various urban surfaces.
description: A dark gray, slip-on athletic shoe with a speckled white sole and orange heel accent, featuring a knit upper and a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the textured knit upper, speckled white sole, and orange accent at the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange heel band, pull tab, and the width of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brand logo, knit texture, and the full length of the speckled sole.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the seamless toe area, knit pattern, and the shoe's slip-on construction.
attribute_logo: Embossed 'S' logo on the outer heel in gray
